heading: Allotments
label: 10803 Allotments
notes: Amendments1991—Par. (2). substituted “individuals with mental illness” for “mentally ill individuals” in two places.Pub. L. 102–173
amendments: Amendments1991—Par. (2). substituted “individuals with mental illness” for “mentally ill individuals” in two places.Pub. L. 102–173

children.text: which meet the requirements of ; andsection 10805 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: protect and advocate the rights of individuals with mental illness; and

children.label: B
children.text: investigate incidents of abuse and neglect of individuals with mental illness if the incidents are reported to the system or if there is probable cause to believe that the incidents occurred.
